The gradient \(\nabla f\) consists of partial derivatives:  
\(\frac{\partial f}{\partial x_1} = 2\cos x_1 - 2x_1 x_2 x_3 + e^{x_2}\),  
\(\frac{\partial f}{\partial x_2} = -x_1^2 x_3 + x_1 e^{x_2}\),  
\(\frac{\partial f}{\partial x_3} = -x_1^2 x_2\).  

Evaluating at \((2,3,5)\):  
\(\frac{\partial f}{\partial x_1} = 2\cos 2 - 2(2)(3)(5) + e^3 \approx 2(-0.4161) - 60 + 20.0855 \approx -40.74\),
